7.description: one row per building (deduplicate) using bygningid

10.description: return only bygningid for final output

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class values present in utlosningomr

3.description: select kvikkleire polygons for the identified high risk class (will use exact value from step 2)

4.description: reduce selected kvikkleire polygons to Trondheim extent by intersecting with municipality geometry

5.description: select buildings in Trondheim municipality using kommunenummer from step 1

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced kvikkleire polygons

7.description: deduplicate to one row per building (group by bygningid)
